steps.title: Find the hourly rate
steps.content:
Use the table entries for $h=1$ and $h=3$. The slope is
$$\frac{250-140}{3-1}=\frac{110}{2}=55$$
So the charge increases by $55$ dollars per hour.

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: The linear model has slope $55$ and intercept $85$, so it is $$f(h)=55h+85$$ The answer is B.
